title: anthyllis vulneraria var. insularum
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria var. insularum, also known as the Island Kidney Vetch, is a variety of the Kidney Vetch plant that is native to the Channel Islands. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce pain, and prevent infection. The health benefits of Anthyllis vulneraria var. insularum include its ability to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a popular herb for topical applications and teas. Herbal preparations of Anthyllis vulneraria var. insularum include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from skin irritations to digestive problems.
